argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const aweme_id = "{{ aweme_id }}"; const reschedule = "{{ reschedule }}"; const caption = "{{ caption }}"; if (reschedule) { const newTime = typeof reschedule === 'string' ? (reschedule.includes('T') ? Math.floor(new Date(reschedule).getTime() / 1000) : parseInt(reschedule)) : reschedule; const res = await fetch('https://creator.douyin.com/web/api/media/update/timer/?aid=1128', { method: 'POST', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ aweme_id: aweme_id, publish_time: newTime }) }).then(r => r.json()); if (res && res.status_code !== 0) { return [{ status: '定时发布API错误 ' + res.status_code + ': ' + (res.status_msg || '') }]; } } if (caption) { const res = await fetch('https://creator.douyin.com/web/api/media/update/desc/?aid=1128', { method: 'POST', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ aweme_id: aweme_id, desc: caption }) }).then(r => r.json()); if (res && res.status_code !== 0) { return [{ status: '正文更新API错误 ' + res.status_code + ': ' + (res.status_msg || '') }]; } } return [{ status: '更新成功' }]; }
